name: ex-appagent
description: Autonomous app management agent for data-driven app growth, experiments, metrics collection, and revenue optimization.

interface.shortDescription: Data-driven app growth and optimization agent.
interface.longDescription: EX-APPAgent helps manage app growth toward $20/day revenue by collecting metrics, analyzing trends, tracking experiments, monitoring competitors, and generating guarded optimization plans.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this app's growth data and suggest the next experiment.
Review competitor and revenue trends for this app.
